prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海大学在江西省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约23970名、26454名、23478名、26345名、38145名。2021至2023年位次在2.3万–2.6万间窄幅波 动，2024年因江西新高考改革（理科→物理类）位次后移至26345名，2025年进一步大幅后移至38145名，近两年累计后移约11700名，下行趋势明显；该校在江西 省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年26人、2022年28人、2023年28人、2024年40人、2025年48人，呈持续扩招态势。2026年物理类计划40人、医学类计划8人，合计48人，与20 25年持平。计划停止扩张，对位次的进一步下行有一定缓冲作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学是国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第180名、2022年第182 名、2024年第173名、2025年第198名，近年排名在180–200名区间波动，属于中后段211院校。抖音学校热度总排名第10 6位，评价为"一般"，视频数13条，综合热度约49565，在211高校中曝光度偏低，未出现明显正面或负面舆情事件。历史投档异常记录中未发现青海大学相关信号；第五轮学科评估中青海大学未进入A-及以上等级名单，无显著优势学科加持，对高分考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 江西省2026年普通高考考生总数约474900人 ，按近年物理类占比约56.4%估算，物理类考生约267844人，较2025年266425人增加约1419人（+0.53%），考生规模小幅增长，竞争略有加剧。；青海大学位于青海省西宁市，与江西省地理距离较远，属于典型的跨省招生。跨省报考中地域偏好因素可 能对位次有一定下拉作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移至38145名的下行惯性、2026年招生计划与2025年持平（48人）不再扩招、江西省物理类考生小幅增加约0.5 3%导致竞争略加剧，以及学校声誉一般、无优势学科加持、地域偏远等综合因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在38145名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约38645名，区间38145– 39145名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University in Jiangxi Province's Science/Physics category were approximately 23970, 26454, 23478, 26345, and 38145 respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 23,000 and 26,000 from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to Jiangxi's new college entrance examination reform (Science → Physics category), the ranking shifted backward to 26345. In 2025, it further significantly shifted backward to 38145, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11,700 over the past two years, showing a clear downward trend. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province for Science/Physics category: 26 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 48 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. In 2026, the Physics category plan is 40, and the Medical category plan is 8, totaling 48, unchanged from 2025. The halt in plan expansion provides some buffer against further ranking decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Rankings: 180th in 2021, 182nd in 2022, 173rd in 2024, and 198th in 2025, fluctuating in the 180–200 range in recent years, placing it in the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranking is 106th, with a rating of "average," 13 videos, and a comprehensive popularity of approximately 49,565, indicating relatively low exposure among 211 universities, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents. No signals related to Qinghai University were found in historical abnormal admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University did not enter the A- or above level list, lacking significant advantageous disciplines, thus its appeal to high-scoring students is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900. Based on the recent Physics category proportion of about 56.4%, the estimated number of Physics category candidates is about 267,844, an increase of about 1,419 (+0.53%) from 266,425 in 2025, indicating a slight increase in candidate scale and slightly intensified competition. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, geographically far from Jiangxi Province, making it a typical cross-provincial enrollment. In cross-provincial applications, geographical preference factors may have a certain downward pull on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward inertia of the ranking significantly shifting backward to 38,145 in 2025, the enrollment plan for 2026 being unchanged from 2025 (48 people) with no further expansion, a slight increase of about 0.53% in Physics category candidates in Jiangxi Province leading to slightly intensified competition, as well as the university's average reputation, lack of advantageous disciplines, and remote location, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from 38,145. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 38,645, with a range of 38,145–39,145.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 38,145), focus on aiming for competitive Computer majors; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 39,145), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university has no A- or above discipline evaluation data, so this advice is based on major selection.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 青海大学在江西省医学类2021年最低录取位次为23970名（计划5人），2022年25248名（计划5人），2023年大幅下滑至43253名（计划6人），2024年回升至34018名（计划扩至9 人），2025年继续回升至32981名（计划维持9人）。2026年医学类招生计划缩减至8人，较2025年减少1人，缩招幅度约11.1%。从趋势看，2023年位次大幅下滑后，2024-2025年连 续两年回升，但回升幅度明显收窄（2024年回升9235名，2025年仅回升1037名），表明医学类报考热度趋于平稳。缩招将加剧竞争，推动位次进一步上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学是国家'211工程'重点建设高校和'双一流'建设高校，位于青海省西宁市，是一所综合性大学。作为西部地区重点高校，其医学类专业在区域内具有一定影响力，但受地 理位置偏远、经济发展水平等因素影响，对江西省考生的吸引力相对有限，整体报考热度不及中东部同类院校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来全国报考热度持续较高，临床医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。青海大学在江西省医学类招生规模较小（2026年仅8人），专业设置涵盖临床医学（含卓越医师班 ）、预防医学、中医学、药学、针灸推拿学、护理学等。其中临床医学类专业录取位次最高，护理学相对较低。由于招生人数少，位次易受考生志愿填报偏好波动影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年青海大学在江西省医学类最低录取位次约为30982名，较2025年的32981名上升约1999名（更难进），主要受招生计划缩减及医学 报考热度持续影响。预计录取区间在30482-31482名之间，建议考生结合自身位次合理填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Qinghai University's minimum admission ranking for Medicine in Jiangxi Province was 23,970 in 2021 (plan: 5 students), 25,248 in 2022 (plan: 5), sharply dropped to 43,253 in 2023 (plan: 6), rebounded to 34,018 in 2024 (plan expanded to 9), and continued to rebound to 32,981 in 2025 (plan maintained at 9). In 2026, the Medicine enrollment plan is reduced to 8 students, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a reduction of approximately 11.1%. Trend-wise, after the significant drop in 2023, rankings rebounded for two consecutive years in 2024-2025, but the rebound narrowed markedly (9,235 in 2024, only 1,037 in 2025), indicating that the popularity of Medicine applications is stabilizing. The enrollment reduction will intensify competition, pushing rankings further upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a national '211 Project' key construction university and a 'Double First-Class' construction university, located in Xining City, Qinghai Province. It is a comprehensive university. As a key university in the western region, its Medicine majors have a certain influence within the region, but due to factors such as remote geographical location and lower economic development level, its appeal to Jiangxi candidates is relatively limited, and overall application popularity is lower than similar institutions in central and eastern regions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national application popularity for Medicine majors has remained high, with core majors like Clinical Medicine facing particularly intense competition. Qinghai University's Medicine enrollment in Jiangxi Province is small (only 8 students in 2026), covering majors such as Clinical Medicine (including the Excellent Physician Class), Preventive Medicine, Traditional Chinese Medicine, Pharmacy, Acupuncture and Tuina, and Nursing. Among these, Clinical Medicine majors have the highest admission rankings, while Nursing is relatively lower. Due to the small number of enrollments, rankings are susceptible to fluctuations in candidate preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's Medicine in Jiangxi Province in 2026 will be approximately 30,982, an increase of about 1,999 places (harder to enter) compared to 32,981 in 2025, mainly due to the reduction in enrollment plan and sustained popularity of Medicine applications. The expected admission range is between 30,482 and 31,482. Candidates are advised to fill in their preferences reasonably based on their own rankings.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Clinical Medicine is the most competitive, while Nursing has a relatively lower admission threshold. Choose a reasonable combination based on personal interest and ranking.
